title: Kortney Gibson | Partner | BAL Immigration Law
content:
“Corporate immigration law may seem transactional, but I never lose sight of my purpose — to make a positive difference in people’s lives.”
Kortney is a Partner in BAL’s Dallas office. She has an exceptional ability to develop simple processes for complex work, and she has revolutionized the methods used to meet regulatory immigration processing requirements. Her efficiency and operational discipline result in high levels of customer satisfaction and internal productivity. Her extensive experience enables her to build trust with and create innovative solutions for clients. When not at work, Kortney enjoys spending time with family and friends, traveling around the world, snuggling her four dogs and watching TCU football.
Texas Tech University School of Law, J.D., cum laude Texas Tech University, MBA Texas Christian University, BBA (International Emphasis)

### Fact check: H-1B visas are not cheap, convenient or easy to obtain
